description_long: This is a rectangular, dark-stained wooden storage box with a robust and industrial appearance. The box features a framed panel design on its sides, with visible metal fasteners at the corners, suggesting reinforced construction. The front and back panels have horizontal slats, possibly for ventilation or aesthetic effect, while the top and sides are solid wood. The surface has a matte finish, with visible wood grain and a slightly rough texture. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, giving it a utilitarian look. Its size and sturdy build make it suitable for storing tools, equipment, or other items in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or storage rooms.
description: A dark wooden storage box with framed panels, horizontal slats, and visible metal fasteners, featuring a sturdy, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: The end view shows the framed panel with horizontal slats and four metal fasteners at the corners.
description_view_1: The side view displays the long, solid wood panel with a framed border and horizontal wood grain.
description_view_2: The opposite end view mirrors view 0, with the same slatted panel and metal fasteners.
description_view_3: The opposite side view is similar to view 1, showing the long, solid wood panel with a framed border.
